ddt:Target.Name: Cluster_7Inch_TFT_V1.5
ddt:Target.Description:
PDE-Vignesh kannan V1.0 -> creation of Builder Date:19-08-2019
--------------------------------------------------------- MJN Hari ganesh V1.1-> Screens modified IO control DID modified Routine control DID modified Bx frame DID added
.......................................................... Vigneshwaran S V1.2-> Below DIDs are added 013C 0346 0332 DTC information updated Screens Modified for New DID ........................................................... MJN Hari ganesh V1.3-> Screens modified SW reset DID changed Dynamic scale configuration removed
............................................................ Vigneshwaran S V1.4-> Below DIDs are added 0342 0343 0345 Data modified for Power and torque DID F0D0, F0D1 read request added for snapshot Screens Modified for Missed features
............................................................ Vigneshwaran S V1.5--> Below DIDs are corrected 2006 - Data: Battery Voltage resolution updated 0207 - Data: Odometer byte allocation corrected 0208 & 0209 DID added

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjt failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Lost CAN communication or BUS OFF
High Side PWM outputs for backlight monitoring

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: OutputControlStatus
Data.Comment: Testing output : Status

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: VINDataIdentifier

Data.Name: ParkingBrakeType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the parking brake type (manual or assisted).

Data.Name: OverspeedWarningPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of overspeed warning (10204_1).

Data.Name: ClusterCurrentDistanceByDIAG
Data.Comment: This parameter allows R/W of the total current_distance (see EN_ODO_012), with a resolution of 1km.
Data.Description: This parameter allows R/W of the total current_distance (see EN_ODO_012), with a resolution of 1km. A write request is irreversible

Data.Name: NumberResetsCausedByFailures
Data.Comment: The NumberResetsCausedByFailures parameter is used to count the number of resets caused by fai
Data.Description: The number_resets_caused_by_failures parameter is used to count the number of resets caused by failures (e.g. watchdog)

Data.Name: HandBrakeState
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: BrakeFluidLevelState
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Item.Text: Circuit short to battery or open circuit

Data.Name: BatteryVoltage
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Item.Text: Out of range (measured resistance doesn't match with defined resistance ranges)

Data.Name: TemperatureUnit_CF
Data.Comment: Defines the default temperature unit that must be displayed by the Cluster ECU

Data.Name: MSCOilChgInitialDistanceInKM_CF
Data.Comment: Shall be written together with MSCOilChangeUsualDistanceInKM !

Data.Name: MSCOilChgInitialPeriodInDay_CF
Data.Comment: Shall be written together with MSCOilChangeUsualPeriodInDay !

Data.Name: MSCOilChgUsualDistanceInKM
Data.Comment: Is the current value displayed for the Oil Schedule Change in km.

Data.Name: MSCOilChgUsualPeriodInDay
Data.Comment: Is the current value displayed for the Oil Schedule Change in day.

Data.Name: CauseOfLastTripComputerReset
Data.Comment: CauseOfLastTripComputerRese

Item.Text: Overflow of Electrical consumption value (EV specific)

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: systemSupplierIdentifierDataIdentifier

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumberDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Comment: ECUSerialNumberDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Comment: identificationOptionVehicleManufacturerSpecific

Data.Name: RoutineStatusRecord.RoutineInfo
Data.Comment: Routine information

Data.Name: ProgrammingOperationFingerprint
Data.Comment: vehicleManufacturerSpecific

Data.Name: OperationalReference
Data.Comment: OperationalReference

Data.Name: MSCOilChgWarningThresholdKM_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilomet
Data.Description: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilometer (ValConfigSeuilAlerte1_Km in 65450-2009-45-CDC_CLUSTER_X98).

Data.Name: L2displayed10_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: L2displayed11_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: L2displayed12_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: MexType_CF
Data.Comment: Used to identifying the management of the current driving mode

Data.Name: ExtECUDistBeforeReadjust
Data.Comment: The cluster stored distance before readjustment (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence)
Data.Description: The cluster stored distance before readjustment (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_036 and EN_ODO_040). The stored distance is the value of CAN received parameter before readjusting.

Data.Name: TypeApprovalNumber2
Data.Comment: exhaustRegulationOrTypeApprovalNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: VOLUME_UNIT
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the volume unit (manual or automatic) of the vehicle.

Data.Name: Water_In_Fuel_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of AIRBAG ECU.

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber_DAI
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM (Nissan)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber_DAI
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM (Nissan)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber_N
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM (Nissan)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: WDGT_AFE_IFE_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of AIRBAG ECU.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: BootVersion
Data.Comment: BootSoftwareIdentificationDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: ClusterDistBeforeReadjust
Data.Comment: Cluster stores cluster current distance before readjustement (in case of CAN or cluster incoherence)
Data.Description: The cluster stores cluster current distance before readjustement (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_036 and EN_ODO_040). The stored distance is the last value of cluster_current_distance calculated parameter before readjusting.

Item.Text: Overflow of electrical consumption value (EV specific)
Overflow of electrical consumption value (EV specific)

Data.Name: OutputControl_Buttons.Value
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently pointer(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Data.Name: OutputControl_Display.Value
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently the display(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Data.Name: OutputControl_Backlight.Value
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently the backlight(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Data.Name: BatteryWarningType_CF
Data.Comment: This DID is used to indicate by which signal the the battery warning shall be triggered (wire or CAN

Item.Text: CAN by EMM or ECM or BCM
Disable both internal and external control
Enable both internal and external control

Data.Name: Cc_Sl_Acc_Service_Customer
Data.Comment: This parameter allows type of speed control

Data.Name: CCSLOverspeedBuzzerInhibition_CF
Data.Comment: Activation / Inhibition du buzzer lié à l'override limiteur de vitesse

Item.Text: With expected and unexpected overspeed buzzer

Data.Name: Esc_Present
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ESC ECU.

Data.Name: StopStartPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of Stop Start feature.

Data.Name: OverSpeedAlert_Configuration.L1_TT_Enable
Data.Comment: Overspeed Regulation Alert Configuration - Level 1 alert Telltale Configuration

Data.Name: OverSpeedAlert_Configuration.L1_Buzzer_Enable
Data.Comment: Overspeed Regulation Alert Configuration - Level 1 alert Buzzer Configuration

Data.Name: OverSpeedAlert_Configuration.L2_TT_Enable
Data.Comment: Overspeed Regulation Alert Configuration - Level 2 alert Telltale Configuration

Data.Name: OverSpeedAlert_Configuration.L2_Buzzer_Enable
Data.Comment: Overspeed Regulation Alert Configuration - Level 2 alert Buzzer Configuration

Data.Name: OverSpeedAlert_Thresholds.Level1
Data.Comment: Overspeed Regulation Alert Configuration - Level 1 Threshold in kmph

Data.Name: OverSpeedAlert_Thresholds.Level2
Data.Comment: Overspeed Regulation Alert Configuration - Level 2 Threshold in kmph

Data.Name: Freeshift_Management_Present
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of freeShift management (20312_x).

Item.Text: With FS and Without Symbol permanently Disp
With FS and With Symbol permanently Displayed

Data.Name: Clock_Displayed
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the diplay of the clock (10106_1).

Data.Name: Telematic_System_Present
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the telematic system Type.

Data.Name: Ocs_Present
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of OCS (Oil Control System).

Data.Name: Trip_Distance
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: Driver_Module_Buttons_State.OK_Button
Data.Comment: This parameter provides status of OK button press

Data.Name: Driver_Module_Buttons_State.Menu_Button
Data.Comment: This parameter provides status of MENU button press

Data.Name: Driver_Module_Buttons_State.Down_Button
Data.Comment: This parameter provides status of DOWN button press

Data.Name: Driver_Module_Buttons_State.Up_Button
Data.Comment: This parameter provides status of UP button press

Data.Name: Fuel_Gauge_Value
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: Trip_Fuel_Used
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: Trip_Timer
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: L2_1
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: L2_2
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 2 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_2.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 1/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_2.

Data.Name: L2_3
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 3 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_3.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 2/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_3.

Data.Name: L2_4
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 4 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_4.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 3/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_4.

Data.Name: L2_5
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 5 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_5.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 4/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_5.

Data.Name: L2_6
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 6 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_6.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 5/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_6.

Data.Name: L2_7
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 7 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_7.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 6/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_7.

Data.Name: L2_8
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 8 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_8.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 7/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_8.

Data.Name: L2_9
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: AT_BeepInRPresent_CF
Data.Comment: Beep en marche arrière pour BVA

Data.Name: External_Temperature_Present
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the external temperature management.
Data.Description: Note 1: When the EXTERNAL_TEMPERATURE_PRESENT parameter is at 01b, it means that External Temperature sensor acquisition is not managed directly by the cluster

Item.Text: External Temp. measurement but no display
External Temp. Measurement and Displayed in LCD

Data.Name: Oil_Level_Present
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of oil level management (10102_x).

Data.Name: TRIP_COMPUTER_TYPE
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the trip computer type displayed.

Data.Name: TPMS_PRESENT
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of TPMS

Data.Name: REAR_SBR_PRESENT
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of rear Seat Belt Reminder.

Data.Name: FRONT_SBR_INHIBITION
Data.Comment: This parameter allows the activation or not of Front Seat Belt Reminder warning (sound & Flashing)

Data.Name: OIL_PRESSURE_THRESHOLD
Data.Comment: This configuration is used for the oil pressure warning. If the value = 11111b then cluster uses the
Data.Description: This configuration is used for the oil pressure warning. If the value = 11111b then cluster uses the CAN parameter for this warning (no else oil pressure sensor is an input of the cluster).

Data.Name: DAY_BACKLIGHTS_PRESENT
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to force the backlight of the cluster to be ON in day mode. This paramete
Data.Description: This configuration is used to force the backlight of the cluster to be ON in day mode. This parameter has no effect on night mode backlight management.

Data.Name: POWER_STEERING_TYPE
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the type of the power steering.

Data.Name: C_VALERTE_CARBURANT
Data.Comment: The "C_VALERTE_CARBURANT" parameter defines the threshold below low fuel level warning occurs.

Data.Name: EMM_PRESENT
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of EMM ECU

Data.Name: GEARBOX_TYPE
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the GearBox type (manual or automatic) of the vehicle.

Data.Name: MILEAGE_UNIT
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the mileage unit type (km or miles).

Data.Name: HFM_PRESENT
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of HFM ECU.

Data.Name: LANGUAGE
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the language used for messages displayed.

Data.Name: FIRST_WARNING_THRESHOLD_MAINTENANCE_SCHEDULE
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilomet
Data.Description: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilometer (ValConfigSeuilAlerte1_Km in 65450-2009-45-CDC_CLUSTER_X98).

Data.Name: NEXT_SERVICE_INITIAL_DISTANCE_IN_KM
Data.Comment: Re-initialisation value for the distance to next service

Data.Name: NEXT_SERVICE_INITIAL_DURANTION_IN_DAY
Data.Comment: Re-initialisation value for the time to next service

Data.Name: NEXT_SERVICE_USUAL_DISTANCE_IN_KM
Data.Comment: Current remaining distance to next service

Data.Name: NEXT_SERVICE_USUAL_DURANTION_IN_DAY
Data.Comment: Current remaining time to next service

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_1_ON_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_2_ON_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 2 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_3_ON_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge decreasing Hysteresis value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_4_ON_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_5_ON_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_6_ON_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_8_ON_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_1_OFF_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_2_OFF_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_3_OFF_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_4_OFF_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_5_OFF_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_6_OFF_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_7_OFF_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_8_OFF_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: EngineCoolantTemp_Thresholds.ECT_BAR_7_ON_VALUE
Data.Comment: Engine coolant gauge level 1 threshold value
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Item.Text: All LED Bar Graphs (ECT+Fuel) + (ECT and Fuel indicators) OFF
All LED Bar Graphs (ECT + Fuel, ECT and Fuel indicators) ON

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: AIRBAG_PRESENT
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of AIRBAG ECU.

Data.Name: ABS_PRESENT
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ABS ECU.

Data.Name: CARBURATION_TYPE
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the carburation type of the vehicle.

Data.Name: L0_Value
Data.Comment: This parameter is the measure of fuel gauge sensor converted in litre using Vx_FUNC_Rx table.

Item.Text: L2 is initialized with RecalageL2_EnAPC threshold
L2 is initialized with RecalageL2off_L0 threshold
L2 is initialized with Diag request

Data.Name: L0on_Value_During_Fuel_Update
Data.Comment: The "L0ON_VALUE_DURING_FUEL_UPDATE" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update wh
Data.Description: The L0on_VALUE_during_fuel_updateparameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Data.Name: L3_Value_During_Fuel_Update
Data.Comment: The "L3_VALUE_DURING_FUEL_UPDATE" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update what
Data.Description: The l3_value_during_fuel_update parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Data.Name: L2off_Value_During_Fuel_Update
Data.Comment: The "L2OFF_VALUE_DURING_FUEL_UPDATE" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update w
Data.Description: The L2off_VALUE_during_fuel_update parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Item.Text: Display corresponds to the stored value
Meas not possible - delay since Ign OFF < 1 mn
Battery voltage too low for measure
Trip Unit has been correctly configured
Trip Unit has not been correctly configured

Data.Name: ConfigurationDataReferenceAfterConfigurationProcess
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM (Nissan)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: Vehicle_Configuration_1
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN V

Data.Name: Rotation Timer for TT Queue
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: TORQUE_DISP_PERCENTAGE
Data.Comment: Torque displayed in percentage

Data.Name: POWER_DISP_PERCENTAGE
Data.Comment: Power Displayed in percentage

Data.Name: Vehicle_Configuration_2
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN V

Data.Name: DeliveryModeDisplay_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of Door Ajar.

Data.Name: MENUPAGETIMER_TM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of AIRBAG ECU.

Data.Name: OutputControl_Backlight_Gauge Value
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently the backlight(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Data.Name: PM25PRESENT_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of Door Ajar.

Data.Name: Cut off time for Current Display TT
Data.Mnemonic: Cut off time for Current Display TT
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: Dynamic_Scale_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of AIRBAG ECU.

Data.Name: Driver_Module_Buttons_State.Back_Button
Data.Comment: This parameter provides status of DOWN button press

Data.Name: ACCEL_DISP_MS2
Data.Comment: Acceleration display

Data.Name: DISTANCE_UPDATE_BY_EXTERNAL_ECU_COUNTER_NVM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU
Data.Description: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU (ABS or ECM) request (number of readjustment due to an cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_040).

Data.Name: Copy Distance_Update_By_Diag_Counter_S
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance update number with DIAG request.

Data.Name: Copy Distance_Update_By_External_Ecu_Counter_S
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU
Data.Description: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU (ABS or ECM) request (number of readjustment due to an cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_040).

Data.Name: DISTANCE_UPDATE_BY_DIAG_COUNTER_NVM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance update number with DIAG request.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Item.Text: RoutineControl.To zero Trip Computer Variables and L2 LBackUp updates_Start
RoutineControl.Synchronization of the total DISTANCE between Cluster ECU and external ECU_Start

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: RoutineControl.Oil drain reset_Start
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "the maintenance schedule reset" routine, Routine ID = $02.

Request.Name: DataRead.TypeApprovalNumber2
Request.Comment: READ - Références Pièces - Numéro d'homologation numeric

Request.Name: RoutineControl.Service reset_Start
Request.Comment: Used to reset Service counter (Time and Distance)

Request.Name: RoutineControl.Synchronization of the total DISTANCE between Cluster ECU and external ECU_Start
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "Synchronization of the total DISTANCE between Cluster ECU and external ECU" routine, Routine ID = $03

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.C_S1
Request.Comment: The "C_S1" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS1 and kMajS1)

Request.Name: DataRead.C_S2
Request.Comment: The "C_S2" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS2 and kMajS2)

Request.Name: DataWrite.C_S1
Request.Comment: The "C_S1" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS1 and kMajS1)

Request.Name: DataWrite.C_S2
Request.Comment: The "C_S2" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS2 and kMajS2)

Request.Name: DataWrite.C_S3
Request.Comment: The "C_S3" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS3 and kMajS3)

Request.Name: DataRead.C_S3
Request.Comment: The "C_S3" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS3 and kMajS3)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Request.Name: DataWrite.FRONT_SBR_INHIBITION
Request.Comment: Careful, don't display this action on a screen

Request.Name: DataRead.C_SEUILS
Request.Comment: The "C_SEUILS" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (SEUIL_H and SEUIL_B)

Request.Name: DataWrite.C_SEUILS
Request.Comment: The "C_SEUILS" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (SEUIL_H and SEUIL_B)

Request.Name: RoutineControl.To zero Trip Computer Variables and L2 LBackUp updates_Start
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "To zero ADAC simulation command + L2 and LBackUp updates" routine, Routine ID = $01

Request.Name: DataRead.Cut off time for Current Display TT

DataItem.Name: Cut off time for Current Display TT

Request.Name: DataWrite.Cut off time for Current Display TT

DataItem.Name: Cut off time for Current Display TT

Request.Name: DataRead.Odometer of the last occurence
Request.Comment: Read Odometer of the last occurence

Request.Name: RoutineControl
Request.Comment: You should remove ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.xxx data. These are examples.

Device.Name: Lost CAN communication or BUS OFF

Screen.Name: Coefficient & ADAC alert and correction capability
Hard wired, Battery and ADAC Information

Label.Text: Hard wired, Battery and ADAC Information

Send.RequestName: DataWrite.Cut off time for Current Display TT

Display.DataName: Cut off time for Current Display TT
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Cut off time for Current Display TT

Input.DataName: Cut off time for Current Display TT
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Cut off time for Current Display TT
